description: Style NoteIn earthy tones, coolers comes up with this sharp pair of sandals for a great look this spring. Sandals needn't necessarily tone down your casual ensemble - this pair is the right choice to perfectly offset your summer look. Style this with fitted trousers or cargo shorts for maximum impact.Product DetailsLight brown round toed sandals with connected forefoot and midfoot strapsSoft, padded footbed Upper adhered to the textured rubber outsole, with an upraised heel and groovesMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with soft cloth to maintain shine and keep away dust and dirt
